title: Peekaboo prompt-suggestion onboarding — auto vs manual prompts
html:
peekaboo new-brand onboarding: pick prompt-generation method (auto-suggest based on brand+industry, or manual), language English, location US — already prepared 10 Discovery / Purchase Intent / Sentiment prompts. Yahir is inside the product at 2 AM, reverse engineering exactly how the AI-visibility tracking is operationalized.

peekaboo · insight ai · ai search optimization · prompt generation · aeo agency
